segments.text: We were smiling through the sirens
But we called it perfect timing
I kept looking for the green
Like a sign I could believe in
But the only green was money
You left socks on the floor
Like a war I couldn't win
And we answered it by name
I was tired, you were distant
You got a secret with your phone
I got colder with my tongue
But the lane was a graveyard
Let the mountain keep the weight
I never asked to carry up
Let the silence be the answer
Fought about the words we never really meant
Truth is we were both just swinging at the air
When love felt like a debt
With a pain we won't forget
Let the mountain keep the weight
I never asked to carry up
Let the silence be the answer
When I can't stand up at all
And I'm no longer the moon
but from all those little warnings that we watched him still
maybe I should stop maybe I should drop that don't
know to keep the way that never has to carry up
Maybe I should fall I go down the hall at
the silence be the answer when I can't stand
But the bloodshot fades and the red flags waving the truth
Maybe I should stop maybe I should drop maybe I already have
Fucked up from the beginning always was
